  "executive_summary": "This synchronous-chain architecture (Order → Payment → Stripe) creates a cascading failure corridor where any downstream outage propagates upstream, taking the entire order flow offline. The design needs circuit breakers, retries with backoff, an idempotency layer, a transactional outbox for notifications, and a saga/compensation pattern for the Order-Payment lifecycle.",
